testcase.name: createObjectUsingPojo

failure.message: Unresolved compilation problems: Cannot instantiate the type Data XZ cannot be resolved to a variable Syntax error on token "*", invalid AssignmentOperator The method setYear(int) is undefined for the type Data The method setPrice(double) is undefined for the type Data The method setCPUmodel(String) is undefined for the type Data The method setHarddisksize(String) is undefined for the type Data Objects cannot be resolved to a type Objects cannot be resolved to a type

testcase.failure:
java.lang.Error: Unresolved compilation problems: Cannot instantiate the type Data XZ cannot be resolved to a variable Syntax error on token "*", invalid AssignmentOperator The method setYear(int) is undefined for the type Data The method setPrice(double) is undefined for the type Data The method setCPUmodel(String) is undefined for the type Data The method setHarddisksize(String) is undefined for the type Data Objects cannot be resolved to a type Objects cannot be resolved to a type
